articles.title: Ava Labs Built a Litigation Platform on Avalanche with Kyle Roche
articles.description: Ava Labs developed a litigation platform on Avalanche in collaboration with Roche Freedman founding partner Kyle Roche, according to documents obtained byCrypto Briefing. A pitch deck seen by Crypto Briefing reveals that Roche had pitched the project, dubbed Ryval, to clients in February 2022, advertising an Initial Litigation Offering platform developed in partnership with Ava Labs. Ryval was...

articles.title: Ava Labs Dismisses “Conspiracy” Alleging Avalanche Paid Lawyers to Sue Competitors
